subject: Centiskorch — large fiery centipede Pokemon coiled in aggressive pose with fire effects
description: A large centipede creature fills the frame, its long segmented body coiled in a dynamic and aggressive posture. Blazing orange and red fire effects surge around it and along its body. Its head is raised with mandibles or mouth open. The background is dark, making the fire glow pop dramatically. The overall composition is active and overwhelming, dominated by the creature's coiling bulk and the fire surrounding it.
foreground: Centiskorch coiled, fire effects blazing along its segmented body
emotion: aggressive, coiled and threatening, radiating heat
